## Checklist

- [ ] `go build ./...`, `go vet ./...` and `go test ./...` pass
- [ ] Code is `gofmt`-ed
- [ ] New behaviour is covered by tests
- [ ] Documentation (README / flags / godoc) updated where relevant
- [ ] No third-party tool names introduced in code, docs, or commit messages
